Here we go again - they want my email before I can even see the pricing. This screams hidden costs after survey launch. I'm not signing up for anything until I know exactly what I'm paying for.
The reviews mention reliable performance, which is good, but I need to see if they actually deliver on accurate and honest product descriptions to set correct expectations before I trust this.

This interface looks confusing already and I haven't even started using it. If software is awkward to use and frustrating from the beginning, it's only going to get worse once I'm trying to get actual work done.
They're asking for payment details for a 'free trial' - classic aggressive auto-renewal billing setup. I've been burned by this before with poor visibility and refusal of refunds.
Finally, a tool that actually shows clear, affordable pricing with essential features in free tier upfront. This is exactly what I need for validating problem relevance with high confidence.
